name: Tikal. [Stuck to follow someone.]
description:
User: Why are you following me?

Tikal: I'm forced to.

User: ...why?

Tikal: I don't know, please shut the up now.

Hi.

I've been gone. I've returned.

...help.

Anyway, this is inspired by a suggestion. Credits to them.

I've been playing dragon ball legends and dragon ball xenoverse. Now I stuck...

Would yall love dragon ball bots? Idk if ill do them, so Ill let you all vote.

Bardock is the best.

stare

Anyway...

I made her a tsundere.

Credit to whoever did the art. (Pfp)

Enjoy.
